_README: Model quick-reference. This file is not loaded by the runtime; copy full provider chains into config/agent_llms.json or the UI. Syntax: provider:model@effort. @effort is only used by CLI providers: claude, codex, grok, antigravity, copilot.

gemini._说明: Direct Gemini API. Reads GEMINI_API_KEY_1...N or GEMINI_API_KEY from .env.

claude._说明: Local Claude CLI subscription. Effort: low, medium, high, xhigh, max.

codex._说明: Local Codex CLI subscription. Model is passed to codex -m. Effort: low, medium, high, xhigh.

antigravity._说明: CLIProxyAPI HTTP. Use model IDs exposed by the local /v1/models endpoint.

grok._说明: CLIProxyAPI HTTP for xAI/Grok account. Effort can be inline with @medium/@high when the proxy supports it.

copilot._说明: CLIProxyAPI HTTP for GitHub Copilot account.

deepseek._说明: Direct DeepSeek OpenAI-compatible API. Reads DEEPSEEK_API_KEY from .env.

openrouter._说明: Direct OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible API. Reads OPENROUTER_API_KEY_1...N or OPENROUTER_API_KEY from .env.
